zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Molyneux於1445年出生在英國藍卡爾澤福頓時，他的父親Sir Richard Molyneux23歲，母親Elizabeth Stanley17歲。他於1463年7月11日與Dame Anna Dutton在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1483年7月12日在他的家鄉享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭梅瑟希德澤福頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Molyneux于1445年出生在英国藍卡爾澤福頓时，他的父亲Sir Richard Molyneux23岁，母亲Elizabeth Stanley17岁。他于1463年7月11日与Dame Anna Dutton在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1483年7月12日在他的家乡享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰梅瑟希德澤福頓。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Molyneux was born in 1445, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Richard Molyneux, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Stanley, was 17. He married Dame Anna Dutton on 11 July 1463, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 July 1483, in his hometown, at the age of 38, and was buried in Sefton, Merseyside, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Molyneux est né en 1445, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Molyneux, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stanley, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Dame Anna Dutton le 11 juillet 1463, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 juillet 1483, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Sefton, Merseyside, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Molyneux 1445 in Sefton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Molyneux 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Stanley 17. Er hat am 11. Juli 1463 in England, United Kingdom Dame Anna Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Juli 1483 im Alter von 38 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Sefton, Merseyside, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Molyneux è nato il nel 1445 nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Molyneux, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Stanley, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Dame Anna Dutton il 11 luglio 1463, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 luglio 1483, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Sefton, Merseyside, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Molyneuxが1445年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Molyneuxは23歳，母Elizabeth Stanleyは17歳であった。1463年7月11日にイギリスイギリスでDame Anna Duttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1483年7月12日に故郷で38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスメルセイシドセフトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Molyneux(이)가 1445년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Molyneux(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Stanley(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1463년 7월 11일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Dame Anna Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1483년 7월 12일 그의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 머세이시드 세프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Molyneux nasceu em 1445, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Molyneux, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stanley, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Dame Anna Dutton em 11 de julho de 1463, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de julho de 1483, em sua cidade natal, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Sefton, Merseyside, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Molyneux родился в 1445 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Molyneux было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stanley, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Dame Anna Dutton 11 июля 1463 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 июля 1483 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности сефтон, мирсисид, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Molyneux nació en 1445, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Molyneux, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stanley, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Dame Anna Dutton el 11 de julio de 1463, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de julio de 1483, en su pueblo, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Sefton, Merseyside, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
